content.text: I need a function that generates a complete ingest query configuration dictionary for loading static TSV data from HDFS into our time-series database.
If I don't define any custom job properties on the object itself, will the final ingest query still be valid?
Yes. The function checks if `self.job_properties` exists before attempting an update, meaning it safely merges defaults or adds nothing if no extra properties were set.
Thanks for clarifying how the optional settings are handled.
